_comment: Atomic best-effort cleanup for the arm probe. If the operator cancels mid-probe (after arm but before the recipe's own disarm step has had a chance to run), this recipe disarms the vehicle so cancel never leaves a vehicle armed on the pad. Single matcher uses `any → succeed`: whether the autopilot says 'disarmed', 'already disarmed', or anything else, the cleanup goal — vehicle not under armed power — is satisfied to the best of our ability. The runner / wizard surfaces the underlying outcome through the audit trace if anything was unusual.
